meta.title: EliteTec Tools — Free Browser-Based Business Tools
meta.description: Free, no-login business tools that run entirely in your browser. Start with our Invoice Generator — create and download a professional PDF invoice in minutes.

home.heroHeading: Free business tools that work right in your browser
home.heroSubheading: No sign-up, no installs, nothing uploaded to a server. Pick a tool below and get to work.

invoiceGenerator.title: Invoice Generator
invoiceGenerator.description: Create a clean, professional invoice and download it as a PDF in minutes — completely free, no account required.

invoice.pageIntro: Fill in your details on the left and watch the preview update instantly. When you're ready, download a print-ready PDF.
invoice.name: Name
invoice.taxDisclaimer: This tool does not provide tax or legal advice — confirm applicable rates with a local accountant.
invoice.notesPlaceholder: Payment terms, bank details, thank-you note, or anything else your client should know.

footer.browserOnlyNote: Tools run entirely in your browser — nothing you type is uploaded.
